_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Conduct cybersecurity reviews of OT system engineering plans and documentation
reference_document_element_description: Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-006 (SP, cosine: 0.433), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.422).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.3/10 (raw 0.231). Shared vocabulary: [documentation, system]. NICE-only terms [conduct, cybersecurity, engineering, ot, plans, reviews] vs WIDAI-only terms [application, based, build, design, failure, integration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.858 (P=0.867, R=0.849). Balanced P/R — the 10-word NICE element and 20-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Conduct cybersecurity reviews of OT system engineering plans and documentation" and "Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design,". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.439 > STS 0.231 (gap +0.208). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [documentation, system] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [documentation, system]. NICE-only: [conduct, cybersecurity, engineering, ot, plans, reviews]. WIDAI-only: [application, based, build, design, failure, integration].
